name: round5-golden-corpus
description: Curated retrieval gold-set used by `make eval` and the CI quality gate. Cases cover the four fan-out backends (vector / bm25 / graph / memory). expected_chunk_ids names the canonical chunk(s) every backend stub returns; expected_min_score ensures we don't silently regress on absolute relevance. backend is a documentation hint matching tests/eval/eval_ci_test.go which routes the case to the matching fake.
